subject: docs/OPERATOR-QUICK-REFERENCE.md EVE.exe line claim '310ms (v0.3.0 with shared lib)' is incorrect; actual is 52.5 ms median
context: Closing-the-loop /loop iter 62. Sanctum's iter 1-17 quick-reference shipped at docs/OPERATOR-QUICK-REFERENCE.md (referenced from CLAUDE.md line 68 added in the recent doc-revision). verified_measurement.note: Trial 1 was cold-cache (binary not in OS page cache); trials 2-5 are warm-cache cold-start. The doctrine + matrix + walkthrough use the warm-cache median which matches the operator's typical second-or-later-launch experience after first session of the day.
